name: Mr. Food's Best Burritos
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg (10 ozs) frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonstick skillet, brown the ground beef, onion, and garlic over medium heat for 8 to 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
2. Pour off any drippings and stir in the chili powder, cumin, salt, and pepper.
3. Stir in the thawed and drained spinach, cooking until heated through.
4. Remove from the heat and stir in the cheese.
5. Spoon equal amounts of the mixture onto warmed tortillas.
6. Fold each bottom edge over the filling, then fold each side into the center, overlapping the edges.
7. Garnish with lime slices and jalapeno pepper slices, if desired.
8. Serve with salsa.
Yield: 4 servings
